No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course, being 'Physical Education' and aiming to '提升基本體適能' (enhance basic physical fitness), directly promotes well-being and disease prevention (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and focuses on acquiring specific volleyball skills and knowledge, contributing to learning outcomes.
evidence: 學習排球基本技能及技術

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (co-ed), directly promoting gender equality by ensuring equal access and participation for both men and women (Target 5.1).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to decent work or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The '男女合班' (co-ed) nature of the class promotes social inclusion and equal opportunity irrespective of sex, directly aligning with Targets 10.2 and 10.3.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes teamwork and understanding rules, which can foster fair play and respect, indirectly contributing to foundational principles of justice and peaceful interaction.
evidence: 認識排球運動知識與規則

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course emphasizes teamwork, a fundamental aspect of partnerships. However, the link to large-scale, multi-stakeholder partnerships for global goals (Target 17.17) is very tenuous.
